_comment: List of variant suffix patterns (with leading hyphen) to strip from raw family/model names. Applied when no override or versioned-variant pattern matches. Each entry is a suffix string that, when found at the end of the raw value, identifies a variant to extract. Order in this file does not affect runtime behavior — initParseData() re-sorts suffixes longest-first automatically so the correct greedy match always wins. REMOVED -instruct, -turbo, -base — under the ratified modifier-taxonomy these are GLOBAL modifiers (modifiers.json), not variant designators. The per-family member-guard keeps them as variants for the families that genuinely productize them (turbo->qwen via members), so removing them here only reclassifies the NON-member occurrences.
